sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89617" key="prosklu/stios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσ-κλύστιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n89617.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">he who dashes against</tr_>, of Poseidon, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:22:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.22.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
